targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gold.mart_order_sla WHERE sla_status = 'pending'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gold.mart_order_sla WHERE sla_status = 'late'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gold.mart_stockout_risk WHERE risk_level IN ('critical','stockout')
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN sla_status IN ('on_time_express','on_time') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1) FROM gold.mart_order_sla WHERE sla_status != 'pending'
SELECT movement_date AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Movimentações" FROM gold.fct_movements WHERE movement_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND NOW() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT sla_status AS "Status", COUNT(*) AS "Pedidos" FROM gold.mart_order_sla GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', issued_at), 'YYYY-MM') AS "Mês", company_id AS "Empresa", COUNT(*) AS "Pedidos", ROUND(SUM(total_value)::numeric, 2) AS "Valor Total", ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN sla_status IN ('on_time_express','on_time') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS "SLA %" FROM gold.mart_order_sla GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 24

SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', issued_at), 'YYYY-MM') AS "Mês", ROUND(SUM(total_value)::numeric, 2) AS "Faturamento" FROM gold.fct_orders WHERE issued_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT document_type AS "Tipo", company_id AS "Empresa", COUNT(*) AS "Qtd", ROUND(AVG(total_value)::numeric, 2) AS "Valor Médio" FROM gold.fct_orders GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT operator_user AS "Operador", warehouse_id AS "Armazém", SUM(movement_count) AS "Movimentos", ROUND(AVG(avg_qty_per_move)::numeric,2) AS "Qtd/Mov", ROUND(AVG(complexity_index)::numeric,3) AS "Complexidade" FROM gold.mart_operator_productivity GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 20

WITH pending_orders AS (SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - issued_at))/3600.0 <= 4 THEN '0-4h' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - issued_at))/3600.0 <= 8 THEN '4-8h' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - issued_at))/3600.0 <= 24 THEN '8-24h' ELSE '>24h' END AS aging_bucket FROM gold.mart_order_sla WHERE sla_status = 'pending') SELECT aging_bucket AS "Faixa", COUNT(*) AS "Pedidos" FROM pending_orders GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY CASE aging_bucket WHEN '0-4h' THEN 1 WHEN '4-8h' THEN 2 WHEN '8-24h' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

SELECT order_id AS "Pedido", document_number AS "Documento", company_id AS "Empresa", issued_at AS "Emissão", ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - issued_at))/3600.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Aging (h)", ROUND(total_value::numeric, 2) AS "Valor" FROM gold.mart_order_sla WHERE sla_status = 'pending' ORDER BY issued_at ASC LIMIT 15

SELECT product_id AS "SKU", warehouse_id AS "Armazém", product_class AS "Classe", current_stock AS "Estoque", ROUND(avg_daily_consumption::numeric,1) AS "Consumo/Dia", ROUND(days_to_stockout::numeric,1) AS "Dias Ruptura", risk_level AS "Risco" FROM gold.mart_stockout_risk ORDER BY CASE risk_level WHEN 'stockout' THEN 0 WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END LIMIT 20
